bind-ip.title: IP where asterisk will bind
bind-ip.description: This is the IPv6 or IPv4 that Asterisk will use to bind. By default it will use the local IPv4 of the partition.

anyOf.title: Automatic address
anyOf.description: IPv4 local: IPv4 of the partition. Ipv6 Re6st address: acquired through the Re6st VPN software. Localhost address: for core networks running on the same machine. (default: Automatic)

sip-trunk-server.title: Domain name or IP of the SIP trunk
sip-trunk-server.description: This is the domaine name or the IP of the SIP trunk server to use (e.g. sbc6.fr.sip.ovh).

sip-trunk-number.title: Phone number of the SIP trunk
sip-trunk-number.description: This is the phone number of the SIP trunk.

sip-trunk-password.title: Password of the SIP trunk
sip-trunk-password.description: This is the password of the SIP trunk.

local-number.title: Local extension number
local-number.description: This is the local extension number to call.

log-level.title: Log level
log-level.description: Asterisk log level. Each level includes all less verbose levels. Defaults to 'verbose'.

local-ims-ip.title: Local IMS IP address
local-ims-ip.description: IP address or CIDR network of the local IMS (Amarisoft). Used both for pjsip endpoint identification and as the contact address.
